notes: Statement is titled 'As at March 31, 2024' but is an income statement. There is a prior period adjustment of -157,096 applied to opening accumulated surplus for 2024 (note 18). The 2023 accumulated surplus restated opening balance is 15,578,009 and closing is 26,852,283. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + CMHC + BC Gaming + Province of BC + FNESC + Gitxsan CFS = 23,823,164 + 1,367,034 + 567,402 + 772,584 + 544,194 + 0 + 0 = 27,074,378. OSR = housing rent + interest + miscellaneous = 66,850 + 426,945 + 312,472 = 806,267. Auditor name not provided in the extracted text. Balance sheet data not provided. The annual surplus of 18,360,420 appears unusually large relative to revenues; ISC funding of 23,823,164 is notably high and may include one-time transfers. Capital projects expense line of 351,606 included under expenses_infrastructure alongside operations and maintenance.
